/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/server_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/permission_dao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/decision_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/auth_service_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/admin_dao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/simulation_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/admin_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/admin_service_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/snapshot_dao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/snapshot_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/local_snapshot_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/agent_service_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/auth.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/admin.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/auth_server.dir/src/agent.pb.cc.o -o auth_server  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lbrpc /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlcppconn.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so -lpthread -ldl -lz -lssl -lcrypto -lleveldb
